title: MANN OPTIMIZED PVP
description: This pack is made for pvp will make your game optimized
body:
This is a lightweight, PvP-focused Fabric modpack designed for smooth gameplay and maximum performance.

• Optimized for FPS and low latency
• Minimal visual clutter
• Stable for competitive PvP
• Best used with Theobald’s resource pack
• Ideal for low-end and mid-range systems

Made for fun and educational testing purposes.
https://modrinth.com/modpack/mann-optimized-pvp/version/2hNjsdoi
